response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced full-stack and systems software developer with a strong background in web infrastructure, low-latency services, and developer tooling, but has no discernible experience in SoC or IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, AI accelerator architecture, deep learning workload analysis, or SIMD/MIMD systems. His exposure to AI is limited to agentic workflow tooling (MCP frameworks), which is categorically different from the hardware-level deep learning optimization this principal-level role demands. Despite meeting the educational threshold (BS + 14+ years), none of that experience maps to the core technical competencies required.
strengths: 14+ years of broad software engineering experience including low-latency, high-throughput systems (millions of HTTP req/s at Dunnhumby) demonstrating performance-oriented thinking
Exposure to AI-adjacent infrastructure through MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at current role
Demonstrated polyglot depth including C/C++ and systems-level work (NI LabWindows, wave field synthesis thesis with multi-channel audio)
concerns: Zero experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware architecture, or any chip-level design — the primary technical requirement of the role
No background in deep learning workload analysis, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator optimization (preferred qualifications are entirely absent)
Role requires principal/senior IC hardware-software co-design expertise; candidate's entire career trajectory is software product and web infrastructure, not hardware-adjacent engineering
